case_title: CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. ALEKSANDAR MARIC et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 148 12TH STREET, BUILDING 225, STORAGE SPACE #23 AND VEHICLE STORAGE SPACES #1 AND, #33, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94130
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY SERVED SEP-15-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MARIC, ALEKSANDAR
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $29.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY VIEW STORAGE,LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY
